context.phase_lineage: Phase B (after customs-tariff-completeness Phase A — completed 2026-05-03, 12 tasks merged to origin/main, last commit c1b45017)
context.ui_mockup: docs/mockups/customs-after-phases.html (v3 approved by user 2026-05-03; Phase B sections at lines 111, 881-960)
context.scope_summary: Shared certificates entity (kvota.quote_certificates + M2M) with proportional cost split (always — no UI choice), valid_until expiry tracking with explicit user prompt, cost-aware history autofill (12-month window, loose match), unified UI section 'Расходы по таможне' with two action buttons replacing existing 'Сертификаты на КП' + 'Общие расходы по таможне', modal with multi-select positions + live preview, popover 'Привязать к существующему' from per-item dialog, per-item read-only certificate coverage list, 'Свой расход' custom expense option (same table, is_custom_expense flag), and TableViewsDropdown integration with 4 system views (existing component at frontend/src/features/table-views/ — REUSE).

key_extension_points.db_new_tables: kvota.quote_certificates (cert metadata) + kvota.quote_certificate_items (M2M) — migration 306. Plus kvota.quote_view_preferences.customs_columns_view TEXT NULLABLE — migration 307.
key_extension_points.backend_api: api/customs.py — new POST /certificates, GET /certificates, POST /certificates/{id}/items, DELETE /certificates/{id}/items/{item_id}, DELETE /certificates/{id}, GET /certificates/history
key_extension_points.backend_history: services/quote_certificates_history.py — mirror tnved_user_choices pattern from Phase A
key_extension_points.shared_helper: frontend/src/shared/lib/cost-split.ts + services/cost_split.py — synchronized proportional split helper used by both backend and frontend with parity tests
key_extension_points.frontend_feature: frontend/src/features/customs-certificates/ — new FSD feature (api/model/ui/lib) mirroring frontend/src/features/customs-history/ pattern
key_extension_points.frontend_dialog: frontend/src/features/quotes/ui/customs-step/customs-item-dialog.tsx — extend with read-only «Привязанные сертификаты» list section + «Привязать существующий» popover trigger
key_extension_points.frontend_section: frontend/src/features/quotes/ui/customs-step/customs-step.tsx — replace 'Сертификаты на КП' + 'Общие расходы' sections with unified 'Расходы по таможне'
key_extension_points.frontend_table_views: REUSE existing frontend/src/features/table-views/ component — register 4 system views into customs-handsontable.tsx toolbar (do NOT build new component)

out_of_scope: Phase C: Расширенные нетарифные требования (санитарка / ветконтроль / IP / параллельный импорт)
Phase C: Тип сертификата происхождения enum (CT-1/EUR.1/Form A) — пока type — свободный TEXT
Phase B: Custom column drag-and-drop / user-editable views (только 4 системных view)
context.feature_flag_awareness: Phase B не зависит от ALTA_FEATURES_ENABLED (это про сертификаты, не Alta API). UI работает в обоих состояниях flag.
context.design_system_compliance: Read design-system.md before any UI work. Use .btn BEM classes (no raw button styles). Inter font. Constrained type scale (11/12/14/16/18/20/24px). Constrained spacing scale (4/6/8/12/16/20/24/32/48px). No `transition: all`, no `transform: translateY()` on hover. No inline `style=` for colors/fonts/spacing — use CSS vars or classes. Searchable Combobox for ALL dropdowns (project-wide standard, memory feedback_searchable_select.md re-confirmed 2026-05-01).

phase_a_precedents.manual_toggle_pattern: Auto/Manual radio toggle в customs-item-dialog.tsx Phase A
